sections.heading: New
items: On-device speech detection: Palmier Pro can now detect speakers and silence using Silero VAD and WeSpeaker modeels.
On-device beat detection: Palmier Pro can now detect beats for your audio clips. Right click an audio clip -> Detect Beats, or ask your agent!

sections.heading: Improved
items: Agent tools: More efficient context management
UI: Better clip UI in the timeline.
More accurate clip sync by audio
